name: laslogTMX External Load Match (Placeholder)
description: Receives external load postings and dispatches smart match notifications to laslogTMX carriers via webhook API. Users must enable external_loads_enabled in notification settings.

trigger.notes: Connect your external load source (DAT, Truckstop, email parser, etc.) to this Make.com custom webhook.

downstream.notes: notifications INSERT trigger already dispatches push via /api/push/send when Supabase webhook is configured.

notes: Set LOAD_MATCH_WEBHOOK_SECRET in .env.local and GitHub Secrets. Never commit real secrets.
